mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword})
SELECT * FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword}) ORDER BY ts_rank(search_vector, plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword})) DESC
SELECT p.* FROM post p INNER JOIN post_tag pt ON pt.post_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND pt.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC
